description: Designed, AI-generated graphic. The centerpiece is a pink gift box with a gold ribbon, overflowing with pastel pink and cream roses, peonies, baby's breath, and other flowers, intermixed with fanned stacks and loose $100 bills (Benjamin Franklin notes) scattering into the air alongside flower petals. The scene sits on a white marble surface in a softly lit living-room setting in cream and gold tones with sparkle accents. A cream gift tag with gold cursive reads 'Trump Accounts.' At the top center is the small navy line-art White House emblem with 'THE WHITE HOUSE / WASHINGTON,' and a large navy serif title 'TRUMP ACCOUNTS.'
notable_text: THE WHITE HOUSE WASHINGTON | TRUMP ACCOUNTS | Trump Accounts (gift tag)
